name: sensorExtractInteger
title: sensorExtractInteger
syntax: dword sensorExtractInteger(byte sourceBuffer[], dword bufferByteCount, dword& signalValue, dword bitOffset, dword bitCount, dword msbFirst);
description: Extracts an integer value from the given byte array.

parameters.name: sourceBuffer
parameters.description: The array from which the given value shall be extracted.

parameters.name: bufferByteCount
parameters.description: The length of the source array in bytes.

parameters.name: signalValue
parameters.description: The variable the extracted signal value will be written to.

parameters.name: bitOffset
parameters.description: The offset in bits at which the integer value shall be extracted from the byte array.

parameters.name: bitCount
parameters.description: The length of the value in bits (max. 32 is allowed).

parameters.name: msbFirst
parameters.description: This parameter controls in which order the bits are extracted from the array. 1: the bits will be extracted from MSB to LSB. 0: the bits will be extracted from LSB to MSB.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
